global.title: Global Oil Price Vaults Over $95 a Barrel as War Threats Intensify - The New York Times
global.summary: Oil surged above $95 a barrel as U.S.-Iran fighting continued and shipping uncertainty deepened in the Gulf and Red Sea.
global.whyItMatters: Rising fuel costs and war anxiety can quickly affect families in the church and shape prayers, pastoral care, and public witness.

global.title: Two firefighters killed battling wildfires, French officials say - Reuters
global.summary: French officials say two firefighters were killed near Bordeaux as major fires continued spreading, with another blaze advancing in the Var region.
global.whyItMatters: This is a sobering reminder of sacrificial service and the growing human toll of climate-driven disasters.

global.title: Neighbors unite to protect their town from wildfires in Spain - Reuters
global.summary: Residents in Hijes and nearby towns joined together to fight a wildfire threatening their community in central Spain.
global.whyItMatters: It offers a vivid picture of neighbor-love, courage, and community solidarity that can serve preaching and pastoral encouragement.

canadian.title: Milk and hockey sticks: U.S. sets 50% tariff on Canada - NBC News
canadian.summary: The U.S. announced a 50% tariff on many Canadian goods, signaling a sharp escalation in cross-border trade tensions.
canadian.whyItMatters: Economic strain can ripple into household stress, business uncertainty, and congregational needs across Canada.

canadian.title: Tariff threats, Pan Am wreckage, most powerful passports: Catch up on the day’s stories - CNN
canadian.summary: CNN highlights that the planned U.S. tariff on Canadian imports would be among the steepest since major duties were struck down, while wildfire smoke continues affecting Canadians and Americans.
canadian.whyItMatters: It connects two pressures pastors may hear about at once: economic uncertainty and ongoing public-health concerns from smoke.

persecutedChurch.title: Nigerian pastor highlighted by Trump says he’s next after militia kills his relatives - Fox News
persecutedChurch.summary: Rev. Ezekiel Dachomo says Fulani militia killed nine of his relatives while searching for him and have now threatened to kill him as well.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: This is a direct call to prayer, awareness, and solidarity with suffering believers facing deadly pressure for their faith.

persecutedChurch.title: Woman seriously injured in knife attack during church service in Irish town - New York Post
persecutedChurch.summary: A woman in her 50s was seriously injured in a knife attack during Mass in Tramore, Ireland; parishioners helped respond during the incident.
persecutedChurch.whyItMatters: Church safety, trauma care, and prayerful resilience remain important concerns even in places where worship often feels secure.

leadership.title: 3 Psychological Safety Strategies Every Leader Can Take Action On - Forbes
leadership.summary: The piece urges leaders to build trust by admitting mistakes, regulating reactions, and asking teams, 'What am I missing?' before major decisions.
leadership.whyItMatters: It offers a practical discipleship-shaped leadership habit for staff teams, elders, and volunteers: humility that invites honest feedback.

goodNews.title: "Dear David": Trailblazer's legacy, coach celebrated and hospital network spreads hope - CBS News
goodNews.summary: CBS shares three uplifting stories, including a hospital network helping spread messages of hope and encouragement.
goodNews.whyItMatters: Stories of hope and quiet service can refresh a pastor’s imagination and provide helpful illustrations of grace in public life.
